title: Managing Secrets in CI/CD Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on secure secrets management in CI/CD.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Secrets Management' in Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD)?
options: To securely store and manage sensitive pieces of information—such as database passwords and API keys—that your application project needs to function correctly

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a secrets-management-CI/CD workflow?
options: Using the encrypted 'secrets' or 'variables' provided by your CI/CD platform to securely handle your application's passwords and API keys during a pipeline run
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
